## What changed

Describe the behavior, rule, detector, profile, or documentation change.

## Why

Explain the problem this solves and why the chosen scope is appropriate.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm pack --dry-run --json`
- [ ] New behavior has regression coverage
- [ ] Rule changes include rationale and observable verification
- [ ] Detector changes include evidence and false-positive analysis
- [ ] No copied proprietary prompt text or unlicensed design-system content
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes were reviewed against `SECURITY.md`

## Screenshots or evidence

Include rendered evidence when the change affects generated design guidance or visual behavior.
